question: What is the highest-leverage operating move now?
answer: Implement TASK-056, the QIF executable judgment gate v0, selected by the 2026-07-02 runtime-backed direction review for the v5.1 track.
expectation_state: TASK-056 lands with digest-bound judgments and self-judgment cap; human council ratifies the v5.1 theme before any release claim.
mismatch_state: If the judgment gate cannot reject self-approved work in tests, stop and re-review direction.
scale_direction: Extend QIF gating to task-done and release claims only after TASK-056 proves the primitive.
